monsters.name: Aboleth

actions.name: Tentacle
actions.desc: +9 to hit, 10 ft. 2d6+5 bludgeoning + DC 14 CON save or diseased.

actions.name: Enslave
actions.desc: DC 14 WIS save or charmed until aboleth dies.

legendary_actions.name: Psychic Drain
legendary_actions.desc: Charmed creature takes 3d6 psychic, aboleth regains equal HP.

monsters.description: Ancient aberrations from beyond the Material Plane with perfect memory since creation. They enslave all they encounter.

monsters.name: Air Elemental
monsters.condition_immunities: exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious

actions.name: Whirlwind (Recharge 4-6)
actions.desc: DC 13 STR save or 3d8+2 bludgeoning and flung 20 ft prone.

monsters.description: Beings of elemental air appearing as cyclones.

monsters.name: Bandit
monsters.description: Criminals who roam in gangs.

monsters.name: Bandit Captain
monsters.description: Skilled leader of a bandit gang.

monsters.name: Basilisk

actions.name: Petrifying Gaze
actions.desc: DC 12 CON save or restrained, second failure = petrified 24h.

monsters.description: Eight-legged reptile whose gaze petrifies victims.

monsters.name: Beholder

actions.name: Eye Rays
actions.desc: Three random rays (DC 16): Charm, Paralyze, Fear, Slow, Enervation, Telekinesis, Sleep, Petrification, Disintegration, Death.

monsters.description: Floating aberration with a central magic-suppressing eye and ten deadly eyestalks.

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.description: Hulking goblinoids who deal extra damage when surprising enemies.

monsters.name: Bulette

actions.name: Deadly Leap
actions.desc: DC 16 DEX/STR save or 3d6+4 bludgeoning + 3d6+4 slashing and prone.

monsters.description: Armored land shark that burrows through earth.

monsters.name: Chimera
monsters.description: Hybrid of lion, goat, and dragon.

monsters.name: Clay Golem
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: +8, 2d10+5 bludgeoning + DC 15 CON or HP max reduced.

monsters.description: Animated clay guardian healed by transmutation magic.

monsters.name: Cloud Giant
monsters.description: Aloof noble giants dwelling in cloud castles.

monsters.name: Couatl

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: +8, 1d6+5 piercing + DC 13 CON poison or unconscious 24h.

actions.name: Change Shape
actions.desc: Polymorph into humanoid or beast CR ≤ own.

monsters.description: Benevolent winged serpent celestials serving the gods of good.

monsters.name: Death Knight
monsters.description: Fallen paladin serving dark powers, wielding unholy martial might.

monsters.name: Deva

actions.name: Healing Touch (3/Day)
actions.desc: Touch heals 4d8+2 HP and removes curse/disease/poison.

monsters.description: Angels who serve the gods of good, often disguised as mortals.

monsters.name: Dire Wolf
monsters.description: Massive prehistoric wolves, dangerous pack hunters.

monsters.name: Djinni
monsters.description: Noble genie of the Elemental Plane of Air.

monsters.name: Doppelganger

actions.name: Read Thoughts
actions.desc: DC 11 WIS or telepathic mind reading for 1 min.

actions.name: Shapechanger
actions.desc: Polymorph into Small or Medium humanoid.

monsters.description: Shapechangers who can mimic any humanoid they've seen.

monsters.name: Dragon Turtle

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Bite + two claws or tail + two claws.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: +13, 3d12+7 bludgeoning. DC 20 STR or pushed prone.

monsters.description: Ancient sea creature resembling a massive dragon-turtle hybrid.

monsters.name: Earth Elemental
monsters.description: Living stone that burrows through rock.

monsters.name: Erinyes
monsters.description: Devil warriors who hunt escaped souls. They appear as beautiful winged warriors.

monsters.name: Fire Elemental
monsters.condition_immunities: exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious
monsters.description: Living flame that ignites everything it touches.

monsters.name: Flesh Golem
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
monsters.description: Stitched corpses animated by lightning. Can go berserk below half HP.

monsters.name: Frost Giant
monsters.description: Arctic giants who value physical strength above all.

monsters.name: Gargoyle
monsters.description: Living stone statues, nearly indistinguishable from mundane carvings.

monsters.name: Ghost
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained

actions.name: Horrifying Visage
actions.desc: DC 13 WIS or frightened. Fail by 5+ = aged 1d4×10 years.

monsters.description: Spirit bound to the mortal world by unfinished business.

monsters.name: Ghoul

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: +4, 2d4+2 slashing. DC 10 CON or paralyzed 1 min (not elves/undead).

monsters.description: Undead with paralytic claws who hunger for flesh.

monsters.name: Giant Spider

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: +5, 1d8+3 piercing + DC 11 CON 2d8 poison, paralyzed if 0 HP.

monsters.description: Giant arachnids that restrain with webs and inject paralyzing venom.

monsters.name: Gnoll

actions.name: Rampage
actions.desc: Bonus action bite after reducing enemy to 0 HP.

monsters.description: Hyena-headed humanoids on an endless hunt for flesh.

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.description: Nimble humanoids that use Disengage/Hide as bonus action.

monsters.name: Green Hag
monsters.description: Wicked fey who make dark bargains and torment communities.

monsters.name: Griffon
monsters.description: Lion-eagle hybrid that can serve as a mount.

monsters.name: Harpy

actions.name: Luring Song
actions.desc: DC 11 WIS or charmed, must move toward harpy.

monsters.description: Winged monsters whose song lures victims to their deaths.

monsters.name: Hell Hound
monsters.description: Fiendish hounds immune to fire with devastating breath attack.

monsters.name: Hill Giant
monsters.description: Brutish giants who live to eat and bully.

monsters.name: Hippogriff
monsters.description: Horse-eagle hybrid that can be tamed as a mount.

monsters.name: Hobgoblin
monsters.description: Militaristic goblinoids organized along strict military lines.

monsters.name: Hydra

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: As many bite attacks as it has heads.

monsters.description: Multi-headed monster. Severed heads regrow (two per head) unless fire applied.

monsters.name: Imp
monsters.description: Cunning small devil serving as familiar or spy. Can turn invisible.

monsters.name: Iron Golem
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
monsters.description: Most powerful standard golem, forged from solid iron.

monsters.name: Knight

actions.name: Leadership (Recharges)
actions.desc: Nearby allies add 1d4 to attack or save.

monsters.description: Disciplined warrior who inspires those around them.

monsters.name: Kobold
monsters.description: Small draconic humanoids who rely on pack tactics.

monsters.name: Kraken

actions.name: Lightning Storm
actions.desc: Three bolts, DC 23 DEX, 4d10 lightning each.

monsters.description: Godlike sea monster, among the most powerful creatures in existence.

monsters.name: Lich

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
actions.desc: +12, 3d6 cold + DC 18 CON or paralyzed 1 min.

monsters.description: Undead wizard who achieved immortality by storing soul in a phylactery.

monsters.name: Manticore

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Bite + two claws or three tail spikes.

monsters.description: Lion-human-dragon hybrid that can fire tail spikes.

monsters.name: Medusa

actions.name: Petrifying Gaze
actions.desc: DC 14 CON or restrained; second fail = petrified.

monsters.description: Snake-haired monster who petrifies with her gaze.

monsters.name: Mimic
monsters.description: Shapeshifting predator that disguises as furniture or containers.

monsters.name: Minotaur

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: +6, 2d8+4 piercing. Charge 10 ft for +2d8 + DC 14 STR or prone.

monsters.description: Bull-headed monster that never gets lost in mazes.

monsters.name: Mummy

actions.name: Rotting Fist
actions.desc: +5, 2d6+3 bludgeoning + 3d6 necrotic. DC 12 CON or cursed with mummy rot.

monsters.description: Ancient cursed undead whose touch causes mummy rot.

monsters.name: Orc

actions.name: Aggressive
actions.desc: Bonus action: move toward hostile creature.

monsters.description: Tribal humanoids that worship Gruumsh and value strength.

monsters.name: Owlbear
monsters.description: Classic D&D hybrid of owl and bear - ferocious and territorial.

monsters.name: Pit Fiend
monsters.description: Generals and lords of the Nine Hells, among the most powerful devils.

monsters.name: Purple Worm
monsters.description: Enormous tunneling worm that can swallow entire parties.

monsters.name: Roc
monsters.description: Legendary mountain bird that can carry elephants.

monsters.name: Shadow
monsters.condition_immunities: exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained

actions.name: Strength Drain
actions.desc: +4, 2d6+2 necrotic + 1d4 STR reduction. Creates new shadow if humanoid dies.

monsters.description: Undead that drain strength, creating more shadows from victims.

monsters.name: Skeleton
monsters.description: Animated bones compelled by necromantic magic.

monsters.name: Stone Giant

actions.name: Rock
actions.desc: +9, 60/240 ft, 4d10+6 bludgeoning. DC 17 STR or prone.

reactions.name: Rock Catching
reactions.desc: DC 10 DEX save to catch incoming rock.

monsters.description: Reclusive cave-dwelling giants, talented rock-throwers.

monsters.name: Storm Giant
monsters.description: Most powerful and wisest giants, lords of sky and sea.

monsters.name: Tarrasque

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Frightful Presence + bite + two claws + horns + tail.

monsters.description: The ultimate engine of destruction. Nearly impossible to permanently slay.

monsters.name: Troll
monsters.description: Regenerating monsters stopped only by fire and acid.

monsters.name: Unicorn

actions.name: Teleport (1/Day)
actions.desc: Teleport up to 1 mile with 3 willing creatures.

monsters.description: Sacred celestial horse with healing horn, protects holy forests.

monsters.name: Vampire
monsters.description: Powerful undead who drink blood and are destroyed by sunlight.

monsters.name: Vampire Spawn
monsters.description: Lesser vampires serving their master's will.

monsters.name: Water Elemental
monsters.condition_immunities: exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious

actions.name: Whelm (Recharge 4-6)
actions.desc: DC 15 STR or 2d8+4 bludgeoning + grappled + restrained + can't breathe.

monsters.description: Living wave that engulfs and drowns victims.

monsters.name: Werewolf
monsters.description: Humanoid cursed to transform into a wolf under the full moon.

monsters.name: Wight

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Two longsword or two longbow attacks. One can be Life Drain.

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.desc: +4, 1d6+2 necrotic + DC 13 CON or HP max reduced. Creates zombie on kill.

monsters.description: Evil undead warrior who drains life and creates zombies from victims.

monsters.name: Wolf
monsters.description: Pack predator with coordinated hunting tactics.

monsters.name: Wraith
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.desc: +6, 4d8+3 necrotic + DC 14 CON or HP max reduced.

actions.name: Create Specter
actions.desc: Animate corpse as specter under wraith's control.

monsters.description: Powerful incorporeal undead that drains life force.

monsters.name: Wyvern
monsters.description: Two-legged lesser dragon with venomous tail stinger.

monsters.name: Zombie
monsters.description: Shambling undead. Undying Fortitude: DC 5+damage CON save to survive at 1 HP instead of 0.
